mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an accommodative monetary policy that lowers discount rates and boosts equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 7% indicates tightening labor market conditions that support corporate earnings growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 7%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP and housing starts signals strong consumer demand that drives corporate revenue expansion, creating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through earnings momentum.
failure_condition: The joint growth of GDPC1 and HOUST fails to produce positive 60d returns in 50%+ of cases, or their correlation drops below 0.4.

mechanism_narrative: In high-inflation regimes, rising federal funds rates signal central bank intervention to curb price pressures, which temporarily depresses equity valuations and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5% and FEDFUNDS rises.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production above its 12-month moving average indicates expanding manufacturing activity that boosts corporate profits, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 100.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence between rising payrolls and falling unemployment rates signals labor market strength that supports consumer spending, creating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through sectoral momentum.
failure_condition: The PAYEMS-UNRATE divergence fails to produce positive 5d returns in 50%+ of cases, or their correlation drops below -0.3.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in real sales (RSAFS) below its 6-month moving average indicates weakening consumer demand that pressures corporate margins, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where RSAFS falls below 390000.

mechanism_narrative: In low-rate environments, rising inflation expectations (CPIAUCSL) signal potential monetary policy shifts that create uncertainty and generate negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 50%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS is below 1% and CPIAUCSL rises.
